'''zayono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izzarees|izzarees]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izzarees|izzarees]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zayono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæyeneth|zæyeneth]] || [[word:zæyenej|zæyenej]] || [[word:zæyenesh|zæyenesh]] || [[word:zæyene|zæyene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zayoyonoth|zayoyonoth]] || [[word:zayoyonoj|zayoyonoj]] || [[word:zayoyonosh|zayoyonosh]] || [[word:zayoyono|zayoyono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zayonoth|zayonoth]] || [[word:zayonoj|zayonoj]] || [[word:zayonosh|zayonosh]] || [[word:zayono|zayono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zayofnoth|zayofnoth]] || [[word:zayofnoj|zayofnoj]] || [[word:zayofnosh|zayofnosh]] || [[word:zayofnof|zayofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zayonotho|zayonotho]] || [[word:zayonojo|zayonojo]] || [[word:zayonosho|zayonosho]] || [[word:zayonoko|zayonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zayonoth|zayonoth]] || [[word:zayonoj|zayonoj]] || [[word:zayonosh|zayonosh]] || [[word:zayono|zayono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zayonothol|zayonothol]] || [[word:zayonojol|zayonojol]] || [[word:zayonoshol|zayonoshol]] || [[word:zayonokol|zayonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zayonothotho|zayonothotho]] || [[word:zayonojojo|zayonojojo]] || [[word:zayonoshosho|zayonoshosho]] || [[word:zayonoko|zayonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zayonothon|zayonothon]] || [[word:zayonojon|zayonojon]] || [[word:zayonoshon|zayonoshon]] || [[word:zayonokon|zayonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zayonothoro|zayonothoro]] || [[word:zayonojoro|zayonojoro]] || [[word:zayonoshoro|zayonoshoro]] || [[word:zayonokoro|zayonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
